description:
Join us on Saturday, June 27, from 1–3 PM at Whispering Vine Fourth St. for our annual Rosé Party—an afternoon dedicated to all things pink and sparkling!

Enjoy tastings of 30+ Rosé and Sparkling Wines, flatbreads, and a chance to win in our raffle featuring bottles of rosé, merch, and more. Each guest will receive a raffle ticket upon check-in with their first glass.

Tickets: $50 per person (Includes all wine tastings, flatbreads, and raffle entry)

Event Details:

  • 30+ Rosé and Sparkling Wines
  • Flatbreads included
  • Raffle prizes: Rosé bottles, merch, and more
  • Pink attire encouraged
  • Limited to 70 tickets

Celebrate the summer season in style—don’t miss out!
title: 🌸 Rosé Party
